# We are not a typical VC

[Entrepreneurs](https://www.calmstorm.vc/team#)

We are entrepreneurs, like you, we are not investment bankers.

[Super early stage](https://www.calmstorm.vc/team#)

We focus on what we do best, working with entrepreneurs at the beginning of their (ad)ventures.

[Diversity](https://www.calmstorm.vc/team#)

We believe in diversity and equal opportunities, like many in our industry. The difference is, that we also act on it.

## Team

We are entrepreneurs, adventurers, overachievers and dreamers. Just like you.
